test_model.note: Same model family was used for creation and the separate execution/test chat.

problems_and_fixes_summary: Initial source instructions were first misclassified as a possible package source and then correctly restricted to design input only.
External external knowledge-base/work-tracker lifecycle was converted from a generic late gate into ordered human-operated nodes.
Identity mismatch in a cross-model draft was detected and corrected.
A model-invented retention question was removed.
Exact link placement was narrowed to knowledge-base URL in the work-tracker document and work-tracker URL in README.
A sanitation scan caught a residual filename reference and the package was regenerated.
